TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1954 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 26 a romi'ad masofoc ci Recep Tayyip Erdońüan, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Turkey anini i ci Recep Tayyip Erdońüan, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 28 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i r…ô ¶…ôp tajjip …ôr…¨~…ģo~u*an, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u to~u~urk…ôj anini i ¶i r…ô ¶…ôp tajjip …ôr…¨~…ģo~u*an, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1954 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 26 a romi'ad masofoc ci Recep Tayyip Erdońüan, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Turkey anini i ci Recep Tayyip Erdońüan, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 28 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i r…ô ¶…ôp tajjip …ôr…¨~…ģo~u*an, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u to~u~urk…ôj anini i ¶i r…ô ¶…ôp tajjip …ôr…¨~…ģo~u*an, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
